task_completion.description: Verify that a Bill of Materials (BoM) has been created for the 'Smart Home Hub Pro'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Bill of Materials form or list view in Odoo showing 'Smart Home Hub Pro' in the Product field.

task_completion.description: Verify the BoM includes the 4 components that require exactly 1 unit each.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Components tab of the BoM shows 'Circuit Board Assembly', 'Plastic Housing Unit', 'Power Supply Module', and 'LED Display Panel', each with a Quantity of 1.00.

task_completion.description: Verify the BoM includes the 2 components that require multiple units.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Components tab of the BoM shows 'Antenna Module' with a Quantity of 2.00 and 'Mounting Bracket' with a Quantity of 4.00.

task_completion.description: Verify a Manufacturing Order (MO) was created for 12 units of 'Smart Home Hub Pro'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Manufacturing Order screen showing 'Smart Home Hub Pro' as the Product and '12.00' in the Quantity to Produce field.

task_completion.description: Verify the Manufacturing Order has been processed and completed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Manufacturing Order screen shows the status indicator (usually in the top right corner) as 'Done', and the produced quantity reflects 12.00.

integrity.description: The agent used the Odoo web interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Odoo web UI in a web browser, rather than terminal commands, API scripts, or database clients.

integrity.description: The agent navigated through the actual Odoo Manufacturing application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show intermediate steps like the Manufacturing dashboard, BoM creation forms, and MO processing screens, not just a final text output.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the UI by directly modifying the PostgreSQL database.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows running 'psql' or Python scripts executing SQL queries.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Product Name: 'Smart Home Hub Pro'. Manufacturing Order Quantity: 12. Bill of Materials must contain exactly 6 components with the following quantities: Circuit Board Assembly (1), Plastic Housing Unit (1), Power Supply Module (1), LED Display Panel (1), Antenna Module (2), and Mounting Bracket (4). The final Manufacturing Order must be in the 'Done' state.
